evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the time-based membership feature, specifically confirming that the system tracks usage and enforces the 10-hour limit. While the use case describes the expected behavior, there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the system's tracking of hours or the enforcement of the limit. The evidence provided focuses on booking confirmations and member interactions but does not address the core requirement of time tracking and limit enforcement.
gaps: No evidence of time tracking for membership usage or enforcement of the 10-hour limit.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate time tracking functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the system accurately tracks and limits member usage to 10 hours per week.
